water_still_volvic.label: Volvic Naturelle

mixer_tonic_fever_tree.label: Fever-Tree Premium Indian Tonic Water
props: Global premium leader, famously uses quinine from the 'fever trees' of the DRC
Lower sugar content, utilizing natural cane sugar
Very clean, elegant flavor profile

lang.ja: フィーバーツリー トニック

mixer_tonic_freeway.label: Freeway Tonic Water (Lidl)
props: Lidl's budget tonic water
Solid quinine bitterness, highly carbonated
Excellent price-performance for high-volume party mixing

lang.ja: フリーウェイ トニック

mixer_bitter_lemon_freeway.label: Freeway Bitter Lemon (Lidl)
props: Direct clone of Schweppes Bitter Lemon
Cloudy texture with strong citrus acidity
Sweetened with sugar (no sweeteners in the classic version)

lang.ja: フリーウェイ ビターレモン

mixer_bitter_lemon_k_classic.label: K-Classic Bitter Lemon (Kaufland)
props: Kaufland's budget bitter lemon
Matches the high sugar content of the original brand leaders
Sold in convenient 1.5L bulk bottles

lang.ja: K-Classic ビターレモン

mixer_ginger_ale_ja.label: ja! Ginger Ale (REWE)
props: REWE's entry-level Ginger Ale
Sweet, golden, and mild
Great budget filler for whiskey or purely on ice

lang.ja: ja! ジンジャーエール
